unit.note: test_iterate_phase_timing.py (SSoT+pin, mark sidecar, compute/normalize, CLI, finalize fold, gitignore congruence). Full suites green: shared 3848, shipwright-iterate 476.

integration.note: framework tooling, not cross_component (no merge/hook/phase-validator machinery); deterministic seams are lib/iterate_phase_groups.py + the iterate_phase_timing CLI + the finalize fold, all unit-tested

behaviors.behavior: AC1: ITERATE_PHASE_GROUPS SSoT == the 5 rail nodes (scope build review test finalize)
AC1: SSoT drift-pins to session_plan._PHASE_CATALOG's group order (loaded by file-path to avoid the lib package collision)
AC2: append_mark writes {phase,ts} to the <run_id>.phase_timings.jsonl sidecar
behaviors.evidence: test_append_mark_writes_sidecar PASSED + end-to-end CLI probe (mark scope/build/finalize)

behaviors.behavior: AC2: append_mark is first-wins per group (a re-cross is a no-op, earliest ts kept)
AC2: append_mark rejects an unknown group id (ValueError)
AC2: read_marks skips malformed/off-vocab lines (partial sidecar still yields its groups)
AC2 (security): sidecar_path contains a crafted run_id (../.. cannot escape iterates/)
AC3: compute_phase_timings yields chronological {phase,started,duration_ms}; last group's end = end_ts
AC3: empty marks -> [] (finalize then omits the field)
AC3: durations are non-negative ints (clock-skew / out-of-order clamps to 0)
normalize_phase_timings rejects malformed blocks (unknown group, negative/non-int duration, missing keys, non-list, non-dict entry)
AC2: the mark/summarize CLI works end-to-end and summarize prints computed timings
behaviors.evidence: test_cli_mark_and_summarize PASSED + real-subprocess probe (scope 1113ms / build 1106ms matched 1s sleeps)

behaviors.behavior: AC2: the CLI rejects a non-canonical run_id (exit != 0)
AC4: finalize_iterate folds phase_timings into the work_completed event
AC4 (backward-compat): finalize with no sidecar leaves work_completed unchanged (no phase_timings)
AC4: fold_into_event is additive + best-effort + preserves a pre-existing phase_timings
AC6: the sidecar is gitignored and the template SSoT stays congruent with the framework block; durable <run_id>.json is tracked
behaviors.evidence: test_gitignore_template_congruent.py PASSED (F0 caught the missing template mirror; fixed) + git check-ignore probe
